title: hieracium bifidum subsp. oreites
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. oreites, also known as a subspecies of Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum subsp. oreites include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
